parameters.pythonCode:
import subprocess
import os

url = _input.item.json['body']['url']
output_template = 'data/%(id)s.%(ext)s'
ytdlp_path = r'C:\Users\jpima\AppData\Roaming\Python\Python312\Scripts\yt-dlp.exe'

# Get ID
cmd_id = [ytdlp_path, '--get-id', url]
id_result = subprocess.run(cmd_id, capture_output=True, text=True).stdout.strip()

# Download
cmd_download = [ytdlp_path, '-f', 'bestvideo[height<=1080][ext=mp4]+bestaudio[ext=m4a]/best[ext=mp4]', '--output', output_template, url]
subprocess.run(cmd_download)

return {'id': id_result}

import subprocess

video_id = _input.item.json['id']
input_file = f'data/{video_id}.mp4'
output_file = f'data/{video_id}.mp3'
ffmpeg_path = r'C:\Users\jpima\Downloads\edumind---ai-learning-guide\bin\ffmpeg.exe'

# If ffmpeg is in path, use it directly, else use the binary in the project
cmd = ['ffmpeg', '-y', '-i', input_file, '-vn', '-ar', '16000', '-ac', '1', '-c:a', 'libmp3lame', '-q:a', '4', output_file]
subprocess.run(cmd)

return {'id': video_id, 'audio_path': output_file}

import subprocess
import json
import os

video_id = _input.item.json['id']
audio_path = _input.item.json['audio_path']
whisper_path = r'C:\Users\jpima\AppData\Roaming\Python\Python312\Scripts\whisper.exe'

cmd = [whisper_path, audio_path, '--model', 'base', '--output_format', 'json', '--output_dir', 'data/']
subprocess.run(cmd)

transcript_path = f'data/{video_id}.json'
with open(transcript_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    data = json.load(f)

return {'id': video_id, 'text': data['text']}

messageValues.message:
Actúa como un editor de video experto en TikTok. Analiza la siguiente transcripción estructurada. Tu objetivo es identificar 3 segmentos autónomos que tengan alto potencial de retención.

Criterios de Selección:
1. Gancho Inmediato.
2. Coherencia propia.
3. Duración: 30-60 segundos.

Transcripción: {{$node["Transcribe"].json["text"]}}

Responde ÚNICAMENTE con un array JSON: [{"title": "...", "start_time": 0.0, "end_time": 0.0}]
